mapper.sql: select d.delivery_id, d.delivery_no, d.hospital_id, d.warehouse_name, d.order_id, d.order_no, d.zs_order_id, d.supplier_id, d.delivery_amount, d.delivery_status, d.delivery_person, d.delivery_address, d.expected_delivery_date, d.invoice_no, d.invoice_amount, d.invoice_date, d.order_date, d.audit_status, d.audit_by, d.audit_time, d.audit_remark, d.remark, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, s.company_name as supplier_name from scm_delivery d left join scm_hospital h on d.hospital_id = h.hospital_id left join scm_supplier s on d.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
mapper.select: select r.order_detail_id as line_key, sum(case when d.audit_status = '1' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as audited_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status is null or d.audit_status = '0' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as pending_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status = '2' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as rejected_qty from scm_order_detail_delivery_rel r inner join scm_delivery_detail dd on dd.detail_id = r.delivery_detail_id inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where r.order_id = cast(#{orderId} as char) group by r.order_detail_id

select r.order_detail_id as line_key, sum(case when d.audit_status = '1' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as audited_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status is null or d.audit_status = '0' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as pending_qty, sum(case when d.audit_status = '2' then ifnull(dd.delivery_quantity, 0) else 0 end) as rejected_qty from zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r inner join scm_delivery_detail dd on dd.detail_id = r.delivery_detail_id inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where r.order_id = #{zsOrderId} group by r.order_detail_id

select d.delivery_id, d.delivery_no, dd.detail_id as delivery_detail_id, d.audit_status, d.delivery_status, dd.delivery_quantity from scm_order_detail_delivery_rel r inner join scm_delivery_detail dd on dd.detail_id = r.delivery_detail_id inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where r.order_detail_id = cast(#{orderDetailId} as char) order by d.create_time desc, dd.detail_id

select d.delivery_id, d.delivery_no, dd.detail_id as delivery_detail_id, d.audit_status, d.delivery_status, dd.delivery_quantity from zs_tp_order_detail_delivery_rel r inner join scm_delivery_detail dd on dd.detail_id = r.delivery_detail_id inner join scm_delivery d on d.delivery_id = dd.delivery_id and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') where r.order_detail_id = #{zsOrderDetailId} order by d.create_time desc, dd.detail_id
